title: The great OP_If bug
key_bug_features: Missing User Comments tag in the interface
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, username TEXT NOT NULL, user_comments TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO Users (username, user_comments) VALUES ('user1', NULL);
INSERT INTO Users (username, user_comments) VALUES ('user2', 'This is a comment.');
SELECT username, COALESCE(user_comments, 'No comments') AS comments FROM Users WHERE user_comments IS NULL;
UPDATE Users SET user_comments = 'Updated comment' WHERE id = 1;
